summary: Verified the newly-added cart/checkout icon in PublicHeader. Icon is present, visible, correctly linked to /registrera-fagel, and header layout is intact for both logged-out and logged-in (admin) states on the homepage. However, /galleri and /hittade-faglar do NOT use PublicHeader (they use BackHeader), so the icon does not appear there — contrary to what the review request assumed.

integration_issues.flow: Cart icon on non-Landing public pages
integration_issues.issue: The review request states the icon should also appear on /galleri and /hittade-faglar because they 'use PublicHeader'. In the current code these two pages import BackHeader (see Gallery.jsx line 22 and FoundBirdsList.jsx line 7), NOT PublicHeader. Result: nav-checkout-icon is NOT rendered on /galleri or /hittade-faglar (Playwright count=0). If a globally visible cart icon is required, the icon must also be added to BackHeader (or those pages switched to PublicHeader).

action_items: Decide whether the cart icon should also appear on /galleri and /hittade-faglar. If yes, add the same ShoppingCartSimple Link to /app/frontend/src/components/BackHeader.jsx (with data-testid=nav-checkout-icon) or replace BackHeader with PublicHeader on those routes.
critical_code_review_comments: Only Landing.jsx currently renders PublicHeader; Gallery.jsx and FoundBirdsList.jsx use BackHeader. Review request assumption about shared PublicHeader on those routes is incorrect.

success_rate.frontend: 83% (5/6 asserted behaviours pass; icon missing on /galleri and /hittade-faglar because those don't use PublicHeader)

test_credentials: admin: habib.nazary@hotmail.com / Jordgubbe234@u (login worked, redirected to /admin)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PublicHeader cart icon fix is verified on homepage. If icon needs to appear on /galleri and /hittade-faglar, main agent must edit /app/frontend/src/components/BackHeader.jsx as those routes don't use PublicHeader.
verified_flows: Homepage logged-out: nav-checkout-icon visible, href=/registrera-fagel, login button + logo still present
Homepage logged-in (admin): nav-checkout-icon visible next to Mina inlägg + Admin buttons; icon.x=1312 < my_birds.x=1356 (correct left-of-buttons position)
Header layout intact — logo left, nav center, right-side buttons preserved
not_verified_because_out_of_scope: Checkout flow itself (Stripe) — explicitly excluded by review request
